description_long: This hammer features a robust, polygonal blue metal head with a flat striking face on one side and a sharply curved, pointed pick on the opposite end, making it suitable for both driving and prying tasks. The head is securely mounted on a straight, cylindrical handle that is colored orange and appears to be made of a durable synthetic or composite material. The handle is slightly tapered, providing a comfortable grip for the user, and its length is proportionate to the head, offering good leverage. The blue head has a matte finish, while the orange handle has a subtle texture that enhances grip. There are no visible brand markings, logos, or decorative elements on the hammer. The overall design is utilitarian and practical, with no signs of wear, damage, or additional attachments.
description: A blue metal hammer with a polygonal head and pointed pick, attached to a straight orange handle with a textured grip. The design is practical and shows no visible wear or branding.
description_view_0: The hammer is shown from the side, highlighting the polygonal striking face and the sharply curved pick opposite it, with the orange handle clearly visible.
description_view_1: A top-down view reveals the symmetrical alignment of the head and handle, emphasizing the width of the head and the narrowness of the pick.
description_view_2: The opposite side view displays the same features as view 0, but with the pick and striking face reversed, and the handle's taper more apparent.
description_view_3: A bottom-up view focuses on the flat end of the handle and the broad face of the hammer head, showing the full width of the striking surface.
attribute_handle_type: Straight, cylindrical plastic handle with a slight taper and textured surface for improved grip.
attribute_head_type: Polygonal steel head with a flat striking face on one side and a sharply curved pick (cross-peen) on the other, suitable for both striking and prying.
